message:
feat(engine): promote all lowering gap sites to execution-ready status

All 6 lowering gap sites now have working execution semantics in
addition to parser-ready syntax. Add parser_ready_syntax() and
execution_ready_semantics() const methods to LoweringGapSiteId so
readiness is derived from the site's LoweringGapStatus (Resolved
sites are execution-ready) rather than hardcoded as false.

Update all test assertions across lowering_gap_inventory, CLI, and
integration tests to expect execution_ready_site_count == 6 and
execution_ready_semantics == true for all sites.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
